Supply Chain Transparency

We tell you exactly
where everything comes from.

Global brands increasingly demand full supply chain visibility. At Nedus, we built our sourcing around that requirement — not as a compliance exercise, but as a competitive advantage for the brands we work with.

"Our primary leather comes from Asen Tannery — LWG Gold certified, based in Tuzla's leather industrial zone in Istanbul. The same tannery that supplies some of Turkey's most demanding export clients."

— Nedus Leather, Istanbul
Raw Hide
Ethically sourced bovine hides, traceable origin

Your Brand
Finished goods under your label, export-ready
EU / US / Global
Leather — Fully Flexible
We work with your approved tannery, our LWG Gold partner Asen Deri, or any client-directed source. We match your brand's leather specs exactly.
Asen Deri (LWG Gold) Client's Tannery Any Approved Source
Hardware — Global Sourcing
Buckles, D-rings, zippers, rivets, chains from Guangzhou/Yiwu or Turkish suppliers. Nickel-free, lead-free options available. Or supply your own branded hardware.
Guangzhou / Yiwu Turkish Suppliers Client-Supplied Nickel/Lead-Free
Lining, Thread & Packaging
Lining fabrics, threads, dust bags, boxes and labels sourced locally or from your approved vendors. Brand hangtags, embossed logos, custom packaging — all handled in-house.
Turkish Suppliers Client-Approved Custom Packaging
What We Make

Three categories.
One manufacturer.

Handbags
Women's and men's handbags, shoulder bags, totes, clutches and crossbody styles. Full custom design or CMT on your patterns.
Custom patterns & prototyping Logo embossing & metal branding Full lining & interior pockets Private label packaging
Wallets & SLG
Bifold & trifold wallets, card holders, passport covers, coin purses, key rings and small leather accessories (SLG).
RFID-blocking lining available Card slots & cash compartments Gift box / pouch packaging High-volume capacity
Belts
Men's and women's belts in full-grain, bonded or layered leather. Multiple widths, edge finishing options, buckle sourcing worldwide.
25mm to 40mm widths Edge paint or edge burnish Any buckle finish / source Printed or embossed leather
Why Nedus

What makes us the right
manufacturing partner

01
Verified Leather Source
Our primary tannery partner Asen Deri holds LWG Gold certification — the most rigorous environmental and quality standard in global leather. You can show this to your compliance team.
02
Family Manufacturer = Direct Access
No sales layers. You speak directly with the people making decisions. Faster samples, faster revisions, faster answers. No account managers in between.
03
Competitive MOQ
We work with emerging brands and established labels alike. Our minimums are accessible. Sample costs are credited back on your first production run. Enquire for specifics.
04
Istanbul Location Advantage
3 hours to major European fashion capitals. Faster lead times than Asia, lower logistics costs, same time zone as most European buyers. Customs compliance built in.
05
Your Hardware, Your Rules
Whether you source hardware from Guangzhou, have an approved Turkish supplier, or ship us your own branded metal components — we integrate your supply chain into ours.
06
Printed Leather Capability
Through Asen Tannery, we have access to printed and embossed leather — patterns, textures, custom prints. A rare capability that most small manufacturers cannot offer.
07
EU Chemical Compliance
Leather from our certified tannery comes with REACH-compliant chemical documentation — Azo dyes, Cr(VI), formaldehyde, DMFu. Ready for EU, UK and US import requirements.
08
One Supplier, Three Categories
Handbags, wallets and belts under one roof. Simplify your sourcing, align quality across your accessories range, and reduce supplier management overhead.
Manufacturing Facilities

Built for brands
that demand precision.

Our Istanbul atelier combines 6 specialist modelling masters, 10 senior production managers and 100+ skilled artisans. Every piece passes through hands-on quality control before it leaves our floor.

Compliant Output
REACH, Azo, Cr(VI) — export-ready documentation
Atelier — Production Floor
Pattern Making
In-house modelling masters develop patterns from your tech pack or reference sample. Prototypes within agreed lead time.
Quality Control
Multi-stage QC at cutting, stitching, finishing and pre-shipment. Each piece inspected against your approved sample.
Lead Time & Delivery
Istanbul to European ports in 3–5 days. Export docs, customs compliance and branded packaging included.
Our Ecosystem

Vertically integrated.
From hide to finished product.

Nedus sits at the centre of a family-owned group that spans tanning, manufacturing and branded retail. This vertical integration gives our OEM clients something most manufacturers cannot offer: a fully controlled, traceable supply chain under one ownership.

All entities are family-owned and operated. When you work with Nedus, you have direct access to the entire value chain — from tannery to finished product — under one accountable ownership.

How It Works

From enquiry to
your warehouse

01
Enquiry
Send us your brief — product type, quantity, references, hardware preferences
02
Quote & Materials
We confirm leather source, hardware options and pricing within 48h
03
Sample
Prototype produced. Sample cost credited back on production order
04
Production
Full run with QC at each stage. Progress updates on request
05
Delivery
Export-ready packaging. Customs docs included. Your labels, your branding.
